title: K8s Pod Resources vs SKU Capacity
description: Monitors K8s pod GPU, vCPU, Memory, VRAM, and Local Storage against configurable SKU capacity.

list.name: sku_gpu_count
list.label: SKU: GPU Count
list.description: Total GPUs in the SKU (e.g. 8 for A100x8 node)

list.name: sku_memory_value
list.label: SKU: Memory (in unit below)
list.description: Total memory in the same unit as Memory Unit dropdown (22528 GiB = 22 TiB)

list.name: memory_unit
list.label: Memory Unit
list.description: Unit for memory. SKU memory value must be in this unit.

list.name: sku_vram_gib
list.label: SKU: VRAM (GiB)
list.description: Total GPU VRAM in GiB (640 GiB = 8x A100 80GB)

list.name: sku_storage_value
list.label: SKU: Local Storage (in unit below)
list.description: Total local/ephemeral storage in the unit selected below

list.name: storage_unit
list.label: Storage Unit
list.description: Unit for local storage. SKU value must be in this unit.

panels.title: GPU - SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total GPU requests exceed the configured SKU capacity. EXCEEDS SKU = sum of pod reservations > SKU value you entered.

panels.title: vCPU - SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total vCPU requests exceed the configured SKU capacity. EXCEEDS SKU = sum of pod reservations > SKU value you entered.

panels.title: Memory - SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total Memory requests exceed the configured SKU capacity. EXCEEDS SKU = sum of pod reservations > SKU value you entered.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total VRAM (GPU Memory) requests exceed the configured SKU capacity. EXCEEDS SKU = sum of pod reservations > SKU value you entered.

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total Local Storage (Ephemeral) requests exceed the configured SKU capacity. EXCEEDS SKU = sum of pod reservations > SKU value you entered.

panels.title: Resource Reservation Totals vs SKU Capacity (why violation occurs)
panels.description: Shows the total reserved amount for each resource alongside its SKU capacity. If Reserved > SKU, that resource is in violation. Compare these numbers directly.

panels.title: SKU Capacity - Reservation vs Actual Utilization
GPU - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Reserved = % of SKU claimed by pod requests. Used = actual utilization.

panels.title: vCPU - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Reserved = % of SKU claimed by pod requests. Used = actual utilization.

panels.title: Memory - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Reserved = % of SKU claimed by pod requests. Used = actual utilization.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Reserved = % of SKU claimed by pod requests. Used = actual utilization.

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Reserved = % of SKU claimed by pod requests. Used = actual utilization.

panels.title: Running Pods (selected scope)
panels.description: Total pods in selected namespace(s) / node(s)

panels.title: All Pods - Resource Requests and Limits
panels.description: Every pod in scope with named columns. GPU=count, vCPU=cores, Memory/Ephemeral=selected unit.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit

panels.title: GPU - Request and Limit per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's GPU request and limit shown as gradient gauges. Sorted by highest request. Footer = sum total.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})

panels.title: GPU - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: % of configured GPU SKU consumed by total pod requests

panels.title: GPU - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total GPU reserved, limits, and SKU capacity

panels.title: GPU - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total GPU requests + limits over time. Red dashed = SKU capacity.

panels.title: GPU - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How GPU reservations distribute across nodes. Each color = a node.

panels.title: GPU - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted red = limit. When actual exceeds request, the pod is over-consuming vs its reservation.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})

panels.title: GPU - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods whose actual GPU usage exceeds their request or limit.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 100 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 100 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})) > 0

panels.title: vCPU - Request and Limit per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's vCPU request and limit shown as gradient gauges. Sorted by highest request. Footer = sum total.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})

panels.title: vCPU - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: % of configured vCPU SKU consumed by total pod requests

panels.title: vCPU - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total vCPU reserved, limits, and SKU capacity

panels.title: vCPU - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total vCPU requests + limits over time. Red dashed = SKU capacity.

panels.title: vCPU - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How vCPU reservations distribute across nodes. Each color = a node.

panels.title: vCPU - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted red = limit. When actual exceeds request, the pod is over-consuming vs its reservation.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})

panels.title: vCPU - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods whose actual vCPU usage exceeds their request or limit.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}[5m])) - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}[5m])) - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})) > 0

panels.title: Memory - Request and Limit per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's Memory request and limit shown as gradient gauges. Sorted by highest request. Footer = sum total.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit

panels.title: Memory - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: % of configured Memory SKU consumed by total pod requests

panels.title: Memory - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total Memory reserved, limits, and SKU capacity

panels.title: Memory - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total Memory requests + limits over time. Red dashed = SKU capacity.

panels.title: Memory - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How Memory reservations distribute across nodes. Each color = a node.

panels.title: Memory - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted red = limit. When actual exceeds request, the pod is over-consuming vs its reservation.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit

panels.title: Memory - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods whose actual Memory usage exceeds their request or limit.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $memory_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $memory_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit) > 0

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Request and Limit per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's VRAM (GPU Memory) request and limit shown as gradient gauges. Sorted by highest request. Footer = sum total.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: % of configured VRAM (GPU Memory) SKU consumed by total pod requests

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total VRAM (GPU Memory) reserved, limits, and SKU capacity

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total VRAM (GPU Memory) requests + limits over time. Red dashed = SKU capacity.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How VRAM (GPU Memory) reservations distribute across nodes. Each color = a node.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted red = limit. When actual exceeds request, the pod is over-consuming vs its reservation.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods whose actual VRAM (GPU Memory) usage exceeds their request or limit.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024) > 0

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Request and Limit per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's Local Storage (Ephemeral) request and limit shown as gradient gauges. Sorted by highest request. Footer = sum total.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: % of configured Local Storage (Ephemeral) SKU consumed by total pod requests

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total Local Storage (Ephemeral) reserved, limits, and SKU capacity

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total Local Storage (Ephemeral) requests + limits over time. Red dashed = SKU capacity.

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How Local Storage (Ephemeral) reservations distribute across nodes. Each color = a node.

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted red = limit. When actual exceeds request, the pod is over-consuming vs its reservation.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit

panels.title: Local Storage (Ephemeral) - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods whose actual Local Storage (Ephemeral) usage exceeds their request or limit.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $storage_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $storage_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit) > 0
